Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: rail transit systems [300155844], public transit by form [300155843], public transit (infrastructure) [300155835], transit systems (infrastructure) [300008556], infrastructural systems [300155846], systems by function [300242038], systems (equipment) [300008550], Object Groupings and Systems (hierarchy name) [300241489], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Systems providing heavy rail service operating on an exclusive right of way separate from other traffic systems, usually in an urban context, and with multiunit trains using electric power and moving large numbers of passengers.

Sistemas de servicios provistos de rieles pesados, que operan con un derecho de vía exclusivo, separado de los otros sistemas de tráfico, generalmente en un contexto urbano, y con un tren de vagones múltiples, usando energía eléctrica y trasladando a un gran número de pasajeros.

Systemen die zware railvervoerdiensten bieden die meestal voorrang hebben en zijn gescheiden van andere verkeerssystemen, meestal binnen een stedelijke context en met treinen die bestaan uit meerdere stellen die op elektriciteit werken en grote hoeveelheden passagiers vervoeren.
以專有路權方式行駛的重軌系統，不和其他車輛混合行駛，通常位於城市裡，具多節車廂，電力驅動，承載量大。

Source.Source_ID: 2000004191/Berry et al., Technology of Urban Transportation (1963)
2000034021/Pushkarev et al., Urban Rail in America (1982)
2000004191/Berry et al., Technology of Urban Transportation (1963)
2000039651/Canadian Thesaurus of Construction Science and Technology (1978)
2000004191/Berry et al., Technology of Urban Transportation (1963)
2000034021/Pushkarev et al., Urban Rail in America (1982)

Non-Preferred_Term.Term_Text: sistemas de transporte de tren rápido
sistema de transporte de tren rápido
kuai su gui dao jiao tong xi tong
kuài sù guǐ dào jiāo tōng xì tǒng
k'uai su kuei tao chiao t'ung hsi t'ung
